summary: The diff shows modifications to UpiPaymentButtons.tsx and UpiPaymentOptionsModal.tsx that revert them to a simpler UPI link implementation (using a single generic upi://pay? link rather than app-specific deep links), along with updates to backend/main.mo and supporting files. This appears consistent with reverting Version 28 UPI deep link changes. However, the diff only shows 5 modified files with no removed files, making it impossible to fully confirm the entire project state matches Version 27 across all frontend and backend files.

missing_requirements.requirement: All frontend and backend files reflect the state of Version 27 (not just UpiPaymentButtons.tsx and UpiPaymentOptionsModal.tsx)
missing_requirements.reason: The diff only shows 5 modified files. There is no evidence that all other frontend and backend files were audited and confirmed to match Version 27. The acceptance criterion requires ALL files to reflect Version 27 state, but the diff scope is limited.
